ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size category */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* URL or reference to a size chart image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, US, EU, AU) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* The currency code used in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the size in the region */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* The price per unit of the sold item */,
  "total_sale_amount" REAL /* The total amount of the sale (quantity sold * price per unit) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category it belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing this product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* The selling price of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* The material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the report is for */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the region */,
  "total_stock" REAL /* Total stock remaining in the region */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* The period the report covers (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales Manager, Inventory Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
